extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agents test run interface with the Execution Trace on the left and Agent output on the right. The trace confirms the agent called multiple tools in sequence: searching the incident, retrieving categorization information, looking up the assignee, and updating the ServiceNow incident. The Result tab is selected, displaying the final output fields for category, subcategory, assignee email, and a summary of the actions taken.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows a completed agent test run where the Execution Trace verifies the agent called Search_Incidents_by_Incident_Number, ServiceNow_Incidents_Categorization_Information, SNOW_Assignee_Lookup_Automation, and Update_ServiceNow_Incident, and the Agent output summarizes the final categorization and update.

layout.rationale: High density (1009 chars) + wide (2.97) or very high text
